design_philosophy: Accessible-first, warm, and highly legible design for Indian senior citizens. The interface prioritizes clarity over density, high contrast over subtle aesthetics, and large interactive areas to accommodate motor and visual age-related declines. It avoids sterile clinical looks, opting instead for 'Organic & Earthy' warmth that fosters trust and reduces loneliness.

rules: Base font size must be 18px (text-lg). Do not use text-sm or text-xs.
Line height must be at least 1.5 (leading-relaxed) for all paragraph text.
Avoid text justification. Keep text left-aligned.
Use static field labels, never floating labels.
Maintain WCAG AAA contrast ratio (>7:1) for all text.
Do not use generic gray backgrounds; always tint with warmth (e.g., warm stone, sand).
SOS buttons must always use the destructive color strictly with white text.
Focus rings must be clearly visible: focus:ring-4 focus:ring-offset-2.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use 'Neumorphism-lite' with Flat Solid backgrounds and crisp borders for clarity. Avoid Glassmorphism as blur effects can disorient users with poor vision.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders on cards to clearly define edges. High-contrast border colors.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Subtle ambient shadows (shadow-md) to lift interactive elements, but do not rely on shadows alone for boundaries.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide icons. Minimum size must be 32x32px (w-8 h-8). Pair all icons with explicit text labels. Do not use emojis.

components.buttons: min-h-[56px] px-6 py-3 text-xl font-medium rounded-xl transition-colors. Always include distinct hover/active states.
components.inputs: min-h-[56px] px-4 text-lg rounded-xl border-2 focus:border-primary focus:ring-4.
components.cards: rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 border-2 border-border/50 bg-card. Interactive cards must have a clear hover state (lift and darken border).
components.checkboxes: Extremely large hit areas. The visible box must be at least w-8 h-8.
components.toast_notifications: Do not auto-dismiss or fade out critical messages. Provide a clear, large 'Close' or 'Dismiss' button.
components.navigation: Sticky top header with high contrast background. Must include the Multilingual toggle (EN/KN/HI). No hidden hamburger menus on desktop.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, gap-6, gap-8. Elements must never feel cramped.
layouts.dashboard_grid: Use a clear, distinct Grid for the 7 tiles. Mobile: 1 column. Tablet/Desktop: 2 or 3 columns max. Tiles should be large, blocky, and color-coded lightly if helpful, but primarily rely on clear Typography and Icons.
layouts.containers: Max width 1200px (max-w-6xl) to ensure text lines do not get too long and hard to track.

motion.philosophy: Reduced motion by default. No rapid carousels, no complex 3D scenes, no parallax.
motion.allowed: Simple fade-ins (opacity), subtle scaling on button press, smooth state transitions.
motion.css: transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-200. Do not use 'transition-all'.

accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 56x56 pixels for any clickable element.
accessibility.screen_readers: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons. Semantic HTML strictly required.
accessibility.cognitive: Plain language (6th-8th grade level). One question per screen for multi-step forms.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='sos-emergency-button').

hero.description: Group of Indian senior citizens sitting together, representing community.

communities_yoga.description: Elderly woman in pink sari doing namaste gesture.

communities_gardening.description: Senior woman gardening and interacting with plants.

communities_reading.description: Happy senior woman reading a book.

memory_corner.description: Vintage sepia photo of an Indian family.

ai_companion.description: Abstract friendly blue and white AI sphere representation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind CSS with the provided custom colors, replacing default background and foreground to enforce the earthy, high-contrast theme.
Implement i18next for English, Kannada, and Hindi. Ensure the language toggle is prominently placed in the main navigation with a minimum 56px touch target.
For the AI Companion, integrate the Web Speech API. Add massive, clearly labeled 'Hold to Speak' (Speech-to-Text) and 'Read Aloud' (Text-to-Speech) buttons.
The Dashboard must feature 7 distinct tiles: Communities, AI Companion, Daily Care, Memory Corner, Mood Check, Profile, and a highly prominent SOS button.
SOS button MUST be red (destructive) with white text, positioned persistently or highly visible on the dashboard, with a data-testid='sos-button'.
Use standard Shadcn UI components but heavily override their sizes: buttons must be min-h-[56px] and fonts text-lg minimum.
Do not use any 3D libraries (Three.js/R3F) or complex animations. Keep the interface completely static and clear to prevent disorientation.
universal_guidelines: Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic: no generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform styling.
Do not use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors.
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Target specific properties.
DO NOT use transparent backgrounds for headers or dropdowns to ensure text readability.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡) for icons. Use Lucide React icons instead.
Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
